name: Boston Private Financial Holdings, Inc.
description: Boston Private Financial Holdings, Inc. was a leading provider of fully integrated wealth management, trust, and private banking services. Headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, the company offered comprehensive financial advice and investment management solutions to high-net-worth individuals, families, businesses, and select institutions. Boston Private operated offices in key metropolitan markets across the United States, including Boston, New York, Los Angeles, San Francisco, and San Jose, before its acquisition by SVB Financial Group in 2021.
